sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94752" key="skeuo/fulac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκευόφῠλ-αξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n94752.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">storekeeper</tr_>, ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.39</biblScope> </bibl> (<date TEIform="date">iii B.C.</date>, written <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκεο-</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
